summary: Enthusiastic fan discovery of a first‑time Dead show from the taper’s section; recording quality not detailed but valued for its rarity
review: The reviewer is thrilled to finally hear a Grateful Dead concert they attended as a teen, describing it as their “first Dead show” and thanking the archive. No specific comments on performance or sound were provided, so the tape is appreciated mainly for its availability rather than technical merit.
